content:
hoyo currently doing:
poaches some of the best dev teams from different places across world
ai chat bot
3d npc movement using ai (shown on their piano video)
ai npc in petit planet holding multiple conversations, knowing morals and severity of consequences, remembers your decisions globally, can do interactions between players like buying something for another player
massive-scale distributed cloud rendering technology, aka graphics and resource intensive stuff handled on their gpus then streamed to you so potato devices can run high end games smoothly

i dunno anymore
czn devs: we think we can copy gacha model without the dev power of hoyo
And to bounce back on CZN discussion, I swear if they nerf Mei Lin after I spend a week farming a semi decent save data ... I uninstal and never come back
Oh no, it's the hoyo neuro sama
and its actually pretty friggin good
im actually scared of whenever they decide to make full on game with no npc text jail, they can say whatever they want with consequences too
They can never make a game with no npc text limitation
i dunno if thats a joke
Didn't they remove the text jail from hsr by adding a skip button tho ?
they can now with cloud rendering and processing, if they manage to get that right in varsapura

petit planet ai npc is still in cbt
varsapura literally made a trailer.... to hire more devs
Is there a release date or rough delivery expectations for honkai pokemon TFT ?
Not before at least one year then
yeah it might come out im guessing end of 2026
Can anyone please tell me what this is? I can't find an explanation anywhere.
youre in the wrong channel but thats talent levels
ok come on monchi im getting slandered here
Yep. That's saying you have 0 levels in madness and 1 in soulforge

I don't think there are any rules for this channel that would limit asking them, but yeah. Best to ask in <#1433513650299076780> or <#1170692781216378960>. Bigger chance of getting your question answered
Gotcha, I see how that would make more sense lol. Thanks again. 🙂
arisu go back to chasing aigis
Werent you around here this summer ? Your pseudo rings a bell but profil say you joined in november ... <:breakinto:1400771681508790292>
He was. He left due to some server drama, but rejoined.
dont make me post the meme arisu
dont make me hate u Kez
Was it about Clem or something
there was a few incidents, all basically mostly or totally unrelated to the actual game.
arisu’s case was that he got false reported by someone and got banned for a week.
false reporter pinged the mods saying slurisu said the n-word
the situation was sort of a mess
arisu made a joke saying he was about to use a slur and doesnt care that he get banned (language barrier, didnt know slur had more significant connotations than simple swearing)
he said a curse in Vietnamese, something like calling someone a horny boi
He deleted the comment, and the false reporter made the ping
this is why you gotta Google before you speak
All of that, combined with the fact that this server doesnt have a bot tracking deleted/edited message logs meant that the mods didnt know what actually happened and so bonked arisu
You mean GPT, its not 2023 old days anymore <:kath_cool:1447714576413233315>
they just saw, oh ping slur, lets goo mute
didnt even double-checking before giving mute
I dont blame villa much. Most of my annoyance is towards the false reporter
i singlehandedly revamp the bot server
a sacrifice must be made, sure we get rid of that glutton guy now
So the false reporter was a hater or something ?
The false report was a joke.
Which is why its even more fucking annoying
welp my drama was quite something

You were hating me even before the rickroll

bully me
buy me as a slave
mock me

nobody knows something like thst so intimately otherwise
especially the info on how it was a mistake
Yes, you can tell he is regretful his joke went too far
yappin here instead of doing raid 😔

and will sleep after slandering you
can afford to miss a day
my big problem is all my friends are pollux
i just friended all the gmurphies
you put 3 rando awakener no wheel no cov, its a win regardless
lemme take my 1 gmurph friend and 5 pollux friends
I have an underbuilded gmurphy if that helps
im gonna collect your friend codes like pokemon
\- and this is completely irrelevant since daily reset means you cant do raid anyways
hopefully we get a raid thats not after midnight
but your current readiness for raid, regardless of whether or not youd do it, is just a lack of preparation
theres a bajillion gmurphies and basically all of them are accepting follows in a reasonable amount of time due to the current event
taking like 2 minutes yesterday to go look at random list and friend any e3 gmurphy you see for like 2 minutes would have given you like 30 gmurphies today
honestly I just don't feel the need to raid this time around
putting in the effort feels too much rn
team doesnt matter, only e3 gmurphy does. even level 20 e3 gmurphy, since levell compensation

e3 Murphy that good ?

instead of raiding I got marisa to plat

im typing between eye boss phase changes

but i get tired of the fireball spam
I dont hado much tbh, you can press a lot with his kit
ranked is full of very scrubby shotos tbh

you moved on to greener pastures?

moved to morimens after my disappointment
Is SF6 your first street fighter ?
I played 5 when it came out
Morimens with CZN budget would have been perfect <:A_pinch:1432980538536493057>
and when I go to the arcades I play T hawk

I was playing akuma and Dictator
Didn't enjoy the v trigger system tho
akuma had a really bad v trigger and v skill
you'd have done better playing kage
V skill was ok, at least had fun with it
Anyway, SF6 in the other hand
I just couldnt handle the fact that I dont have the time anymore to match my usual rank  / skill cap
I play 3 matches everytime I have time
I found out thats a game im enjoying only when im at my best, being casual feels frustrating, if that makes sense
playing perfectly gives you thst rush
but when youre not on form youre just giving yourself shit for every mistake
65-70 ish pullls making my selector choice quck and easy
Yeah, and pulling out the best combos and setup is actually a lot of work
thsts why I'm happy not doing all that
I like to relax when I play and just enjoy it
Yeah its actually not needed at all to have fun
If you're not mind stuck on this like I am haha
most of the time I don't combo properly
I just am good at spacing and neutral
Well, Marisa is one character you can have fun and result without much combos
thsts why i got her to plat
yeah i missed it at its prime
I play with friends now sometimes
nothing like hopping in vc and playing hakan till someone rage quits

Prob easier now with hitbox I guess
he's such a pain to use

In the end its really about preference

I just want to get to master on controller

so you were the root cause of it all
